docs.title: NestJS Official Documentation
docs.description: A progressive Node.js framework for building efficient, reliable, and scalable server-side applications with TypeScript. Covers fundamentals, techniques, recipes, CLI, and GraphQL/microservices integration.

docs.description: Generate OpenAPI specifications from NestJS decorators and TypeScript types.
